rationale: The cited paper is not a generic background match: its core model is explicitly about a dominant low-cost retailer (Wal-Mart-like asymmetry) and predicts manufacturer profit and wholesale-price effects. The citing paper’s central outcomes are exactly supplier profits and wholesale prices under Wal-Mart entry, with mechanism-focused interpretation, so this citation is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism anchor rather than mention-only (and it is directly DOI-matched).
